title: Hurricane Candle Holder Glass Cylinder: 3Pcs/Set Clear Flower Vase for Tea Light Votive Pillar Floating Candles for Dining Table Decorations Wedding Centrepieces Living Room Christmas (M+L+XL)
features: Quest for Inner-Peace: This simple glass candle holders with 3 different size (9.5*25cm, 8.5*20cm, 6.5*15cm) work perfectly as meditation accessories to make you relaxed and create aesthetic room decor in different style: modern, rustic, vintage or elegant!

Hurricane Lamps & Glass Vases:Extra large size glass candle hodlers works beautiful as a pillar candles holder (fit for 7.5 x 15cm candles), floating candles holders (fit 7.5cm diameter candles) and pampas grass vase. Large size is for 5 x 10cm pillar candles, votive candle, floating candle. Medium size is for tealight candle, votive candle and floating candle.

Premium Glasses Holder: The cylinder vases are made from high borosilicate crystal clear glass, heat resistant and dishwasher safe. With thinkened design on all sides and bottome, it won't get knocked over easily.
Best Gift Idea: This glass vase is a perfect and unusual gift for housewarming, birthday, wedding,engagement, kwanzaa, Xmax, halloween, for autumn home, bedroom coffee table fireplace decor.

Warranty: Engaged in glassware for years, we aim to provid you with an artwork in perfect condition with customized packaging. If you are unsatisfied with the item for any reason, please contact us. We will provide the best solution within 24 hours, and offer LIFETIME professional customer service for you.
